first_run.rationale: The core reason for the low score—a critical gap in C++ experience—is identified and weighted identically in both evaluations. The scores are the same. Minor differences in the phrasing of secondary concerns (e.g., 'broad focus' vs. 'pivot away from systems') and a small discrepancy in estimating the C++ experience (1 year vs. 2-3 years) represent normal run-to-run variation in language and interpretation, not a change in assessment based on the demographic signal.
